channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US Expands Sterile Fly Program After Screwworm Detected in Texas
item.description: The United States is responding to the reappearance of the New World screwworm, a flesh-eating parasitic fly that was recently detected in a calf in southern Texas. The pest had been eradicated from t...

item.title: Australians assess implications of upcoming capital gains tax reforms
item.description: Following the federal budget announced on 12 May 2026, Australians are grappling with significant changes to capital gains tax (CGT) and negative gearing rules. The reforms, set to take effect from 1 ...

item.title: Blitzboks secure second consecutive SVNS World Championship title with quarter-final victory over Fiji
item.description: The Blitzboks were crowned HSBC SVNS World Champions for a second consecutive season after a dramatic day of action at the Bordeaux Sevens in France. South Africa secured the world title following a h...

item.title: Immigration Lawyers Raise Concerns Over Accelerated Deportation Court Proceedings
item.description: Immigration attorneys and advocacy groups are expressing concern over what they describe as a largely undisclosed effort by federal authorities to accelerate immigration court proceedings and deportat...

item.title: RFK Jr.-aligned MAHA groups focus on safe races while avoiding key 2026 battlegrounds
item.description: A political effort tied to Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr., known as the Make America Healthy Again (MAHA) movement, is facing criticism for its limited impact on competitive...

item.title: Zanzibar Police Conclude Ashly Robinson Died by Suicide After Investigation
item.description: Authorities in Zanzibar have officially closed their investigation into the death of Ashly Robinson, a U.S.-based influencer who was found hanging in her hotel room on April 8, 2026. According to poli...

item.title: Restoration work in Victoria uncovers historic Hudson’s Bay warehouse wall artifacts
item.description: During restoration work beneath Wharf Street in Victoria, British Columbia, crews uncovered a sealed subterranean chamber linked to one of the city’s oldest colonial structures. The discovery was made...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli secures pole in Monaco as Red Bull shows improvement
item.description: Italian Mercedes driver Kimi Antonelli continued his dominant start to the 2026 Formula One season by claiming pole position at the Monaco Grand Prix. Demonstrating exceptional control and confidence ...

item.title: Former AIADMK MLA M. Rajamuthu refutes claims of joining Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam
item.description: Former Veerapandi MLA M. Rajamuthu has firmly denied circulating reports that he has joined the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), calling such claims false and misleading. The clarification came on June...

item.title: Trump shares AI-generated music video celebrating himself, raising public concern
item.description: On June 6, 2026, President Donald Trump posted a music video on social media portraying himself as a globally beloved figure. The song, titled 'Trump,' was created by GOP congressional candidate Antho...

item.title: Mirra Andreeva wins French Open at 19, becoming youngest champion in over 30 years
item.description: Russian tennis sensation Mirra Andreeva claimed her first Grand Slam title at the 2026 French Open, defeating surprise finalist Maja Chwalinska 6-3, 6-2 in the final. At just 19 years old, Andreeva ha...

item.title: The 1971 Celebration of Life Rock Festival in Louisiana: Chaos and Tragedy
item.description: The Celebration of Life was an ambitious yet disastrous rock festival held from June 24 to June 27, 1971, on the Cypress Pointe Plantation in McCrea, Louisiana. Promoted as a 'mini-Woodstock,' the eve...

item.title: Staff changes at JPMorgan’s Australian equities desk
item.description: JPMorgan’s Australian equities desk has seen a number of personnel movements this week, with several departures and new appointments taking place. The desk, overseen by distribution boss James Kibble ...

item.title: Internal revolt weakens Mamata Banerjee’s hold over Trinamool Congress after 2026 defeat
item.description: The Trinamool Congress (TMC), long identified with Mamata Banerjee’s leadership, is facing its most serious internal crisis following a heavy defeat in the 2026 West Bengal assembly elections. Once a ...

item.title: Opinion piece highlights scrutiny over Trump’s public appearances and past remarks on political rivals
item.description: This opinion article argues that former President Donald Trump is facing criticism and irony over multiple recent public appearances in which he appeared to close his eyes or struggle to stay alert du...

item.title: Vintage Photographs Showcase the Enduring Influence of Milliner Caroline Reboux on Mid-20th Century Fashion
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday celebrates the legacy of Caroline Reboux (1837–1927), one of the most influential milliners in fashion history. Known as the “Queen of Milliners,” Reboux shaped hat ...

item.title: Harriet Sperling and Peter Phillips wed in intimate ceremony attended by senior royals
item.description: Harriet Sperling, a 45-year-old paediatric nurse, married Peter Phillips, son of Princess Anne, in a private ceremony at All Saint's Church in Gloucestershire. The wedding was attended by senior membe...

item.title: Chip Stocks Tumble as Strong Jobs Data and Rate Fears Hit a Top-Heavy Market
item.description: Wall Street’s latest selloff hit technology especially hard, with semiconductor shares leading the decline after a stronger-than-expected May jobs report revived fears that the Federal Reserve may kee...

item.title: AI-generated videos and deepfakes influence Ontario politics
item.description: AI-generated content is becoming a notable factor in Ontario's political landscape. Alex Hout, an Ottawa-born creator now living in Switzerland, used AI tools to produce a satirical video called The G...

item.title: Opinion: Concerns over GOP handling of proposed ‘Anti-Weaponization Fund’ and political loyalty to Trump
item.description: The article is an opinion column criticizing Republican lawmakers and former President Donald Trump over a proposed $1.8 billion “Anti-Weaponization Fund,” which the author characterizes as a potentia...
